mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RAW_FILE_UPLOAD ( upload_id, file_name, file_hash, uploader_id, uploaded_at, status_category_value_id ) VALUES ( #{uploadId}, #{fileName}, #{fileHash}, #{uploaderId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{statusCategoryValueId} )

INSERT INTO METADATA_LOG ( log_id, upload_id, provider_id, original_filename, stored_path, validation_status_category_value_id, validation_error_path ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{uploadId}, #{providerId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storedPath}, #{validationStatusCategoryValueId}, #{validationErrorPath} )
INSERT INTO INGEST_LOG ( ingest_id, upload_id, options_json, result_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{ingestId}, #{uploadId}, #{optionsJson}, #{resultJson}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
